Profile

Events are not an end goal — they are the lever to generate, qualify and convert leads.

Trained at Burgundy School of Business (Master in Digital Marketing and Customer Experience), I built hands-on expertise in marketing operations and B2B funnel management at Thiga — a leading product management consultancy (clients: Decathlon, Doctolib, AXA, Disney).

Fluent in French, English, Arabic and Spanish, I am looking to join a large international company in internationally from September 15, 2026.
